label: About
title: About Blue Drift Stele Garden
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 20 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Stallion Fights, by Milkweed and A Dream Of Blue, by Windy & Carl, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Blue Drift Stele Garden: Create a single twilight landscape-shrine image with strong vertical composition and large black breathing room. At center, place one weathered stele-like structure as a specimen presence, framed by crisp off-white borders but carrying rough, grain-broken, organic interior textures. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central stele face, upper circular medallion, and lower tarnished plate.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
